TextView.android:text:
Daily Motivation

1. Set Small Goals
Break big tasks into small, manageable wins.

2. Morning Affirmations
Start your day with a positive 'I can' statement.

3. Visualize Success
Imagine yourself achieving your end goal clearly.

4. Stay Consistent
Discipline is doing it even when you don't feel like it.

5. Limit Distractions
Focus on one task at a time for better progress.

6. Surround Yourself with Positivity
Connect with people who inspire and uplift you.

7. Celebrate Progress
Reward yourself for the milestones you reach.

8. Learn from Failure
View every setback as a setup for a comeback.

9. Take Breaks
Rest is productive; it prevents burnout.

10. Keep Going
The expert in anything was once a beginner.
